zh.lifeSummary: 當Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen於1086年之前出生在瑞士爾利吉包格時，他的父親Hartmann I von DILLINGEN46歲，母親Adelheid von WINTERTHUR KYBURG40歲。他和Ermentrude von Morsberg至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他於1096年在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 迪林根 安 德 堂瑙迪林根 安 德 堂瑙被列為graf。他去世於1151年9月12日在他的家鄉，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格奧斯塔爾布可萊斯納雷海姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen于1086年之前出生在瑞士爾利吉包格时，他的父亲Hartmann I von DILLINGEN46岁，母亲Adelheid von WINTERTHUR KYBURG40岁。他和Ermentrude von Morsberg至少有6个儿子和1个女儿。他于1096年在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 迪林根 安 德 堂瑙迪林根 安 德 堂瑙被列为graf。他去世于1151年9月12日在他的家乡，埋葬在德国巴登-爾特波格奧斯塔爾布可萊斯納雷海姆。

nameMeanings.name: Dillingen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from Dillingen near Augsburg or Tüllingen in Baden.

English (Lincolnshire): habitational name from Drellingore in Kent, recorded as Dillynger in 1264, from the Old English personal name Dylla + -ing-, denoting association, + Old English ōra ‘hill slope’.

nameMeanings.name: Adalbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: Jonathan
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Kyburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swiss German: probably a variant of the personal name Tiburtius.

en.lifeSummary: When Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen was born before 1086, in Kyburg, Zürich, Switzerland, his father, Hartmann I von DILLINGEN, was 46 and his mother, Adelheid von WINTERTHUR KYBURG, was 40. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Ermentrude von Morsberg. In 1096, his occupation is listed as graf in Dillingen an der Donau, Dillingen an der Donau, Bavaria, Germany. He died on 12 September 1151, in his hometown, and was buried in Neresheim, Ostalbkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen est né avant 1086, à Kyburg, Zurich, Suisse, son père, Hartmann I von DILLINGEN, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von WINTERTHUR KYBURG, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Ermentrude von Morsberg. En 1096, sa profession de son indiquée est graf à Dillingen an der Donau, Landkreis Dillingen an der Donau, Bayern, Allemagne. Il est décédé le 12 septembre 1151, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Neresheim, Ostalbkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen vor 1086 in Kyburg, Zürich, Schweiz geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hartmann I von DILLINGEN 46 und seine Mutter Adelheid von WINTERTHUR KYBURG 40. Er hatte mit Ermentrude von Morsberg mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1096 ist sein Beruf als graf in Dillingen an der Donau, Landkreis Dillingen an der Donau, Bayern, Deutschland aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. September 1151 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Neresheim, Ostalbkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen è nato il prima del 1086 nel Kyburg, Zurigo, Svizzera, il suo padre, Hartmann I von DILLINGEN, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid von WINTERTHUR KYBURG, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Ermentrude von Morsberg. Nel 1096, la sua occupazione è indicata come graf nel Dillingen an der Donau, Landkreis Dillingen an der Donau, Bayern, Germania. Morì il 12 settembre 1151, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Neresheim, Ostalbkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingenが1086年以前にスイスズuリチクイブルグで生まれた時，父Hartmann I von DILLINGENは46歳，母Adelheid von WINTERTHUR KYBURGは40歳であった。彼はErmentrude von Morsbergとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。1096年，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス デリンジェン アン ダー ドナウデリンジェン アン ダー ドナウでの職業はgrafと記録されている。彼は1151年9月12日に故郷で死去し，ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグオスタルブクレイスネレシェイムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen(이)가 1086년 이전 스위스 즈u리치 키버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hartmann I von DILLINGEN(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid von WINTERTHUR KYBURG(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Ermentrude von Morsberg(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1096년, 그의 직업은 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 딜링 앤 데르 도나 딜링 앤 데르 도나에서 graf이었다. 그는 1151년 9월 12일 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 오스탤브크레이스 네레셰임에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen nasceu antes 1086, em Kyburg, Zürich, Suiça, seu pai, Hartmann I von DILLINGEN, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von WINTERTHUR KYBURG, tinha 40 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Ermentrude von Morsberg. Em 1096, sua profissão aparece como graf em Dillingen an der Donau, Landkreis Dillingen an der Donau, Bayern, Alemanha. Ele faleceu em 12 de setembro de 1151, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Neresheim, Ostalbkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.Dillingen / Donau, Bayern, Deutschland: диллинген ан дир донау, ландкрис диллинген ан дир донау, беиирн, Германия
ru.Dillingen, Dillingen an der Donau, Dilli: диллинген, диллинген ан дир донау, ландкрис диллинген ан дир донау, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen родился перед 1086 г. в местности кибург, зuрич, Швейцария, его отцу по имени Hartmann I von DILLINGEN было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von WINTERTHUR KYBURG, 40. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Ermentrude von Morsberg. В 1096 году он работал по профессии graf в местности диллинген ан дир донау, ландкрис диллинген ан дир донау, беиирн, Германия. Он умер 12 сентября 1151 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности нирешим, осталбкрис, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen nació antes de 1086, en Kyburg, Zürich, Suiza, su papá, Hartmann I von DILLINGEN, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Adelheid von WINTERTHUR KYBURG, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Ermentrude von Morsberg. En 1096, su ocupación registrada era graf en Dillingen an der Donau, Landkreis Dillingen an der Donau, Bayern, Alemania. Murió el 12 de septiembre de 1151, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Neresheim, Ostalbkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania.
